name: Cheesy Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Sweet (Mild) Italian Sausage - Thinly Sliced
1 medium Green Bell Pepper - Coarsely Chopped
1 lb Medium Shrimp - Deveined and Shelled
2 medium Lobster Tails - Cooked, Shelled, and Sliced into 1/2-Inch Pieces
1 1/2 cups Fusilli Pasta - Cooked and Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, brown the sausage in the oil.
2. Add the onion, green bell pepper, and garlic. Cook and stir until the onion is transparent.
3. Add the beef broth, tomatoes with juice, tomato sauce, wine, shrimp, zucchini, carrots, and celery. Simmer until the vegetables are tender and the shrimp is cooked, about 10 minutes.
4. Add the lobster, pasta, parsley, basil, and cook until heated through.
5. To Serve: Spoon the soup into 8 individual ovenproof crocks. Evenly top each with cheese. Broil, 4 to 5-inches from the heat source, until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
